question: What is the last date to submit the admission form?
answer: The last date to submit the admission form at SIT Nagpur is 30th June 2025. Late applications are not accepted. Visit the admissions portal at admissions.sitng.ac.in.

question: What is the fee structure for BTech?
answer: The BTech fee at SIT Nagpur is ₹1,20,000 per semester including tuition, library, and lab fees. Fees are payable at the start of each semester.

question: When are the semester exams scheduled?
answer: Semester exams at SIT Nagpur are scheduled from 15th November to 30th November 2025. The detailed schedule is available on the student portal at portal.sitng.ac.in.

question: How do I contact the admissions office?
answer: You can contact the SIT Nagpur admissions office by email at admissions@sitng.ac.in or call +91-712-2223344 between 9AM–5PM on working days.

question: What documents are required for admission?
answer: Documents required for SIT Nagpur admission: 10th & 12th marksheets, transfer certificate, migration certificate, 4 passport-size photos, Aadhaar card, and caste certificate (if applicable).

question: Is there a hostel facility available?
answer: Yes, SIT Nagpur has separate hostels for boys and girls. Hostel fees are ₹60,000 per year including meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner). Apply through the student portal.

question: What is the attendance requirement?
answer: A minimum of 75% attendance is mandatory in each subject at SIT Nagpur. Students below 75% are debarred from appearing in semester exams.

question: How can I apply for a scholarship?
answer: Scholarship applications at SIT Nagpur must be submitted via the student portal before 31st August. Merit scholarships, OBC, SC/ST scholarships are available. Contact the scholarship cell at scholarships@sitng.ac.in.

question: What is the timetable for CS-301?
answer: CS-301 (Data Structures) classes are held Monday, Wednesday, Friday 10AM–11AM in Room 204, CS Block. Check the portal for any updates to the timetable.

question: When is the result of the last semester announced?
answer: Results are announced within 30 days after the last exam on the SIT Nagpur student portal at portal.sitng.ac.in. SMS alerts are sent to registered mobile numbers.

question: What are the library timings at SIT Nagpur?
answer: The SIT Nagpur central library is open Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM. On Sundays, it is open from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM during exam periods only.

question: What is the hostel fee for a single occupancy room?
answer: Single occupancy hostel rooms at SIT Nagpur are available at ₹80,000 per year including meals. Double sharing rooms are ₹60,000 per year. Deposits of ₹5,000 are refundable.

question: Who do I contact for admission-related queries?
answer: For admission queries: Email admissions@sitng.ac.in, call +91-712-2223344, or visit the admission helpdesk at the main administrative building, SIT Nagpur, Plot No. 44, Pune-Mumbai Bypass Highway, Narhe, Pune.

question: Where can I find the exam schedule or date sheet?
answer: The complete exam date sheet is published on the student portal at portal.sitng.ac.in under 'Examinations'. You will also receive an email notification 15 days before exams begin.

question: What is the scholarship application deadline?
answer: The scholarship application deadline at SIT Nagpur is 31st August for merit scholarships and 15th September for government scholarships (OBC/SC/ST). Applications submitted after the deadline will not be considered.

question: How can I contact the placement cell?
answer: You can reach the SIT Nagpur Training & Placement Cell by visiting their office in the Admin Block or emailing them at placements@sitng.ac.in. Details of placement drives are also updated on portal.sitng.ac.in.

question: What is the anti-ragging policy at SIT Nagpur?
answer: SIT Nagpur maintains a strict zero-tolerance anti-ragging policy. Any incidents can be reported anonymously to the anti-ragging helpline at antiragging@sitng.ac.in or directly to the helpdesk@sitng.ac.in. Serious disciplinary action is non-negotiable.

question: Where can I check my internal marks?
answer: Internal assessment marks, including mid-semester exams and assignment scores, are uploaded by faculty on portal.sitng.ac.in. Please log in with your PRN to view your detailed internal marks breakdown.

question: When are the backlog exams usually held?
answer: Backlog (ATKT) exams at SIT Nagpur are typically scheduled after the main semester exams. Notification and date sheets are published on portal.sitng.ac.in at least three weeks prior. Register via the exam portal.

question: What sports facilities are available on campus?
answer: SIT Nagpur offers excellent sports facilities including a cricket ground, basketball courts, badminton courts, and an indoor gym. Students can issue equipment using their ID cards from the Sports Complex.

question: What are the canteen or cafeteria timings?
answer: The main campus canteen is open from 7:30 AM to 8:00 PM on all working days. Mini food kiosks near the hostel blocks are open until 10:00 PM for late-night snacks.

question: How do I get the campus WiFi password?
answer: Campus WiFi access is restricted to registered students. You can generate your unique WiFi login credentials through portal.sitng.ac.in under the 'IT Services' tab.

question: What is the rule for getting a gate pass?
answer: Hostel students requiring a gate pass for local specific leave must apply on portal.sitng.ac.in at least 24 hours in advance. Warden approval is mandatory before leaving campus.

question: How do I complete my semester registration?
answer: Semester registration is fully online at SIT Nagpur. Pay your fees via portal.sitng.ac.in, then navigate to 'Academic Registration' to choose your electives before the deadline.

question: What is the process for paper re-evaluation?
answer: If you are unsatisfied with your results, apply for re-evaluation via portal.sitng.ac.in within 7 days of result declaration. A fee of ₹500 per subject is applicable.

question: How can I get an appointment with the Principal?
answer: To schedule an appointment with the Director/Principal of SIT Nagpur, please send a formal email query to principal.office@sitng.ac.in or contact the main helpdesk@sitng.ac.in.

question: Is SIT Nagpur NAAC accredited?
answer: Yes, Symbiosis Institute of Technology (SIT) is accredited by NAAC with an 'A' grade, reflecting our high academic standards and quality engineering education.

question: Is there a transport or bus facility available?
answer: Yes, SIT Nagpur provides an extensive bus and transport facility across major city routes. Bus passes can be applied for at the Transport Office or via helpdesk@sitng.ac.in.

question: What is the policy for industrial visits?
answer: Industrial visits are an integral part of the BTech curriculum. Departments organize at least two visits per semester. Students must submit an NOC from parents on portal.sitng.ac.in to participate.

question: What are the guidelines for final year project submission?
answer: Final year projects must be submitted in the standardized IEEE format. The soft copy must be uploaded to portal.sitng.ac.in and one hard bound copy must be submitted to the department physically.

question: How do I get an NOC for a summer internship?
answer: To get an NOC for external summer internships, submit your offer letter to the Placement Cell profile on portal.sitng.ac.in. Approval takes roughly 3 working days.

question: How many books can I issue from the library at once?
answer: Undergraduate students can issue up to 4 books for a duration of 15 days using their smart ID card. Overdue books incur a fine of ₹5 per day.

question: Is there a strict dress code on campus?
answer: SIT Nagpur enforces a smart-casual dress code. However, on practical days and formal university events, the designated college uniform is strictly mandatory.

question: Is there any medical facility on campus?
answer: Yes, an in-house medical center with a visiting doctor is available from 10 AM to 6 PM. For emergencies outside these hours, contact the hostel warden or helpdesk@sitng.ac.in.

question: How can I join a student club or society?
answer: SIT Nagpur hosts various technical and cultural clubs like the Robotics Club, Coding Cell, and Drama Society. Registration links are broadcast on portal.sitng.ac.in at the beginning of each odd semester.
